other_observers: Dave Leatherman, who found both birds first;
specific_location: Kitty corner from Last Chance Rest Stop
description: feeding together. Both birds were yellow beneath, brightest on throat and chest, dark line through eye, smallish bill (but not thin like warbler), remiges contrastingly darker than wing coverts, green back, gray crow, pale supercilium. One bird was rather bright yellow throughout underparts, the other mostly on throat, chest, and vent.Behaviors: Feeding moderate height in trees. Photographed with spotted cucumber beetle in beak.Call: not heardPlumage: unknown
photographer: Photographer: Steven Mlodinow, Steven Mlodinow, Steven Mlodinow
